mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.brand, v.license, v.model, v.code, v.displacement, v.status, v.type, v.color, v.kilometers, v.reg_time, v.buy_time, v.price, v.battery_type, v.geofence_bind_status, v.geofence_id, v.create_time, v.update_time FROM vehicle v WHERE v.status = '1' AND v.id NOT IN ( SELECT a.vehicle_id FROM application a WHERE a.vehicle_id IS NOT NULL -- 60代表“分配用车”，排查掉在这个时间段内处于“分配用车”状态的申请单所绑定的车辆 AND a.status = '60' AND ( #{endTime} > a.start_time AND #{startTime} < a.end_time ) )
